metadata.title: Brandbook Development | Jon.Branding Agency
metadata.description: A brandbook is your brand's constitution. We create comprehensive guidelines that ensure consistency and save marketing costs.
metadata.keywords: brandbook, guideline, visual identity, brand design

brandbookPage.title: Brandbook Development
brandbookPage.subtitle: Not just a collection of logos, but your brand's constitution that ensures consistency and integrity.
brandbookPage.section1_title: Why every business needs a brandbook?
brandbookPage.section1_p1: A brandbook is a key tool for brand management. It clearly defines all rules for using visual and ideological elements — from logos to tone of voice.
brandbookPage.section1_p2: This document helps avoid marketing chaos, ensures brand recognition, and saves time and money when working with designers and marketers.

values.title: Consistency & Recognition
values.description: Ensures your brand looks the same and professional across all platforms — from business cards to websites.

values.title: Resource Saving
values.description: Eliminates the need to explain design rules to every new employee, speeding up the workflow.

values.title: Brand Protection
values.description: Protects your identity from incorrect use, preserving your brand's integrity and value.

brandbookPage.process_subtitle: Our brandbooks contain all necessary sections for effective brand management:

process_steps.title: Brand Platform
process_steps.description: Mission, values, brand character, and target audience.

process_steps.title: Logo & Identity
process_steps.description: Rules for using logos, corporate colors, and fonts.

process_steps.title: Visual Style
process_steps.description: Rules for using photos, illustrations, and graphic elements.

process_steps.title: Practical Application
process_steps.description: Design examples for real media (business cards, presentations, social media).

brandbookPage.cta_title: Ready to bring order to your brand?
brandbookPage.cta_description: A professional brandbook is an investment in your business's stable future.

problems.text: I have a business but no brand. Nobody knows me.
